## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content creation, and upcoming conference preparations.](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [11 articles + 3 revised pieces delivered, focusing on authoritative tone for full-stack and AI/ML engineers](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [SEO strategy emphasizing LLM monitoring and RAG systems as key differentiators](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Publishing schedule proposed: 1 pillar + 1 cluster article (Mon), 1 article (Wed), 2 articles (Fri)](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Plans to create a definitive piece on "Evaluation Intelligence" with CEO involvement](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy and Keyword Analysis

  - [Deep dive into competitors' gaps, focusing on LLM monitoring and RAG systems](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Analyzed competitors like Langchain and Petronas.ai to identify Galileo's potential leadership areas](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Created topic clusters with pillar content pieces and supporting articles](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Hugging Face identified as a content competitor, particularly for benchmarks and new model releases](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Content Creation and Publishing

  - [11 articles + 3 revised pieces delivered last week](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Proposed publishing schedule: 1 pillar + 1 cluster article (Monday), 1 article (Wednesday), 2 articles (Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Articles to be optimized at 30, 90, and 180 days for ongoing performance](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Team to continue delivering 10 articles weekly](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [CMS credentials to be provided for direct publishing after initial review](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Evaluation Intelligence Category Establishment

  - [Plan to create a definitive piece on "Evaluation Intelligence" with CEO involvement](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Utilize existing assets: Series B press release, Forbes article, and upcoming sales deck](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Aim to create a strong anchor piece that could potentially become a lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Conference Preparation

  - [Team focused on upcoming conference (Oct 29, 10 AM to 2 PM)](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Potential to turn conference content into articles](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

### Technical SEO

  - [Need to clean up blog tags and add SEO tag with web dev team](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [No current backlink strategy in place, but interest in developing one](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shohil to work with web dev team on blog tag cleanup and SEO tag addition](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Marcel's team to draft initial "Evaluation Intelligence" piece using provided assets](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Continue delivering 10 articles weekly and implement proposed publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Explore creation of backlink strategy in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Conor to review 3 articles sent by Pateka for tone and formatting guidance](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Team to consider Agentic Agents content push ahead of December evaluation launch](https://fathom.video/share/W5d5YsLfNFKNva9XG5DrfKr9TvV6ySyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
